items.final_wording: Covers non-complex fracture assessment and follow-up, repeated pain assessment, definitive X-ray reporting, Ottawa ankle and foot rules, and selected scaphoid imaging.

source.title: Fractures (non-complex): assessment and management — Recommendations
source.population: Children and adults with non-complex fractures managed in emergency or orthopaedic services.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected non-complex fracture assessment, documentation, imaging, weight-bearing, information, and follow-up contexts; partial for a generic fracture-follow-up workflow and not validated for UAE pathways.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Covers non-complex fracture assessment and follow-up, repeated pain assessment, definitive X-ray reporting, Ottawa ankle and foot rules, and selected scaphoid imaging.

items.rationale: Supports entered non-complex injury assessment for wrist pain; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Supports pain, swelling, bruising, restricted movement, weight-bearing difficulty, instability, loss of function, mechanism, timing, force, direction, pop or snap, aggravating conditions, and previous episodes.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Muscle Sprains & Strains – 47
source.population: People with muscle sprains or strains suitable for virtual assessment.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed healthcare facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for sprain- or strain-compatible injury documentation in Dubai telehealth; partial for broad foot, hand, sports, fracture, operative, or diagnosis-specific workflows.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports pain, swelling, bruising, restricted movement, weight-bearing difficulty, instability, loss of function, mechanism, timing, force, direction, pop or snap, aggravating conditions, and previous episodes.

items.rationale: Supports entered pain and injury history for wrist pain; no decision is generated.

items.final_wording: Identifies severe pain or swelling, discoloration, weakness, movement loss, numbness, coldness, deformity, persistent symptoms, fracture or dislocation concern, and clinician-selected radiography, ultrasound, or MRI.
